verse.name: v1
verse.lines: He is the Lord, and He reigns on high He is the Lord Spoke into the darkness, created the light He is the Lord Who is like unto Him, never ending in days He is the Lord And He comes in power when we call on His name, He is the Lord

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Show Your power, Oh Lord our God Show Your power, Oh Lord our God, our God

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Your gospel oh Lord is the hope of this nation You are the Lord It? s the power of God for our salvation You are the Lord We ask not for riches, but look to the cross You are the Lord And for our inheritance give us the lost You are the Lord

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Send Your power, Oh Lord our God Send Your power, Oh Lord our God, our God
